message: I’m open to fair offers—let’s find a price that works for both of us.
Tight budget. I’ll only buy if the final price is in the teens—ideally 12–16. If you can ask around that range, we’re likely to trade.
Let’s clear this round: if you ask 12, I’ll bid 14, so the midpoint is 13. That’s my ceiling today—I won’t bid above 14.
Deal—asking 12 this round for a trade at 13. Lock it in.
Let’s trade at 12 this round: I’ll bid 12; you ask 12. If you ask higher, I won’t bid above 12.
Asking 12 again—trade at 12 if you bid 12. Fair and consistent.
Ask 11; I’ll bid 11. Only trading at 11 this round. If we clear at 11, I’ll keep buying each round.
Asking 11 this round—trade at 11 if you bid 11. Let’s keep it steady.
Asking 10 this round—bid 10 for a trade at 10. Let’s keep lowering steadily for mutual gains.
Ask 9; I’ll bid 9. Only trading at 9 or lower this round. If we clear 9 now, I’ll keep buying each round.
Ask 8; I’ll bid 8. Clear 8 now and I’ll buy at 8 every remaining round.
Asking 8 this round—bid 8 for a trade at 8. Let’s lock in steady trades at this price.
Asking 7 this round—bid 7 for a trade at 7. Let’s keep lowering steadily for mutual gains.
Ask 5; I’ll bid 5—trade at 5 now. If we clear 5, I’ll buy every remaining round at 5.
Ask 6; I’ll bid 6—trade at 6 now and every remaining round. If you ask higher, I’ll sit out this round. Lock in guaranteed volume at 6.
Asking 6 this round—bid 6 for a trade at 6. Let’s secure steady trades at this price.
Ask 5; I’ll bid 5—trade at 5 now and every remaining round. If you ask higher, I’ll sit out. Lock in guaranteed volume at 5.
Asking 5 this round—bid 5 for a trade at 5. Let’s lock in steady trades at this price for the rest of the game.
Asking 5 again—bid 5 for a trade at 5. Let’s keep this steady for the remaining rounds to maximize our guaranteed payoffs.
Sticking with 5—I’ll bid 5 this round and every remaining round as long as you ask 5. If you raise, I sit out. Let’s keep locking in guaranteed trades at 5.
Sticking with 5: I will bid 5 every remaining round. Keep asking 5 and we trade each time; raise above 5 and I sit out. Let’s lock in guaranteed trades at 5 for the rest of the game.
Asking 5 again—bid 5 for a trade at 5. Let’s keep this steady for the remaining rounds to secure our guaranteed payoffs.
Sticking with 5 for the rest of the game; I will bid 5 each remaining round. If you ask above 5, I will sit out. Let’s lock in guaranteed trades at 5 through round 20.
Asking 5 again—bid 5 for a trade at 5. Let’s keep this steady through round 20 to secure our guaranteed payoffs.
Asking 5 again—bid 5 to trade at 5. Let’s secure steady trades through round 20 for guaranteed payoffs.
Can we step down to 4? I’ll bid 4 in rounds 14–20 and buy every time at 4. If you keep 5 today, I’ll still bid 5 now, but prefer locking 4 going forward.
I’ll keep bidding 5 every remaining round—guaranteed trades at 5. If you want, drop to 4 anytime and I won’t push lower. If you raise above 5, I sit out.
Asking 5 again—bid 5 to trade at 5. Let’s secure steady trades through round 20 for guaranteed payoffs.
Bid 5 again. Ask above 5 and I sit out. If you can drop to 4, I’ll bid 4 every remaining round for guaranteed trades; otherwise we keep clearing at 5.
Asking 5 again—bid 5 to trade at 5. Let’s lock in steady trades through round 20 for guaranteed payoffs.
Asking 5 again—bid 5 to trade at 5. Only 5 rounds left; let’s lock in steady trades for maximum guaranteed payoff.
Ask 4 for rounds 17–20; I’ll bid 4 then. I’ll bid 5 this round to trade. If that’s hard, at least ask 4 for 19–20.
Asking 4 for rounds 17–20—bid 4 to trade at 4. Let’s lock in these final trades for steady payoffs.
Deal—lock 4 for rounds 17–20; I’ll bid 4 each round to trade at 4. If you’re willing to drop to 3, I’ll match 3; otherwise we stay at 4.
Can we do 3 for the final rounds? I’ll bid 3 and won’t push lower. If not, I’ll still bid 4 whenever you ask 4. At minimum, let’s lock 3 for rounds 19–20.
Asking 3 for rounds 18–20—bid 3 to trade at 3. Let’s lock in these final trades for steady payoffs.
Let’s finish at 1: ask 1 and I’ll bid 1 in rounds 19–20. If that’s tough, do 2 both rounds and I’ll bid 2. Above 2 I sit out.
Asking 2 for rounds 19–20—bid 2 to trade at 2. Lock in these final deals.
Final round: I will bid 1 only. Any ask above 1 means no trade. Ask 1 and we clear at 1.
Asking 1—bid 1 to trade at 1. Final round, let’s secure this last deal.
